category.name: zoo.cageItems
category.item: Meadow
Many grasses, flowers and succulent clover grow in a beautiful, colorful meadow.
Water
Water is not only home to fish, but also a habitat for many species of birds and mammals.
Ice
Not only do penguins and polar bears like cold climates, but the Arctic fox also enjoys ice and snow!
Savanna
Zebras, wildebeests and bison, as well as rhinos and elephants, love to roam the fertile savannah soil, while lions and leopards hunt their prey here.
Desert

Animals like lizards, snakes, and spiders feel right at home in the extremely hostile environment of the desert. However, gerbils, desert foxes, and wild camels have also found a way to adapt perfectly.
Rocks
Rocky landscapes are not rich in water and vegetation. However, rocks retain heat, which is just right for poikilothermic animals like lizards or snakes!
Bamboo grove
Bamboo is the only food for pandas and grows mainly in Asia.
Swamp
The damp and smelly swamp is a great environment for many animal species.
Tundra
Tundra, also known as taiga, is a transitional zone between the frozen lands of the Arctic and the northern coniferous forests. It is home to reindeer, arctic foxes, and arctic hares.
Snow
Many animals feel good in the snow, especially those with thick fur.
Wasteland
Deserts are created when nature is destroyed by influences such as salt, oil, or the use of technology. Life is hard for animals here, so animals and plants support each other.
Primeval forest

Lichens, creeping plants and flying snakes - that's life in the jungle! Many animals eat only one type of plant, while others spend their entire lives in the treetops. Adventure awaits anyone who fights their way through the bushes!
Terrarium
Reptiles, amphibians and arachnids feel right at home in a terrarium. Some are active during the day, others at night, but they are all picky. Terrariums require a lot of care!
Alps
The highest mountains in Europe are home to brown bears, eagles, wolves, lynxes and ibex. Animals that love cold conditions are seriously threatened by climate change.
Cave
A cozy cave not only offers protection from predators, but also maintains the same temperature in winter and summer. Bats and amphibians like deep caves to roost in during the winter.
Forest
Many inconspicuous animals hide in the forest thickets. They are wild cats, owls, mice, deer or woodpeckers. It is a life that people often don't even notice when walking in the forest.
Coast
The coast is the boundary between land and water. As a result, there are a number of interesting animals that have adapted to life on both land and water.
Magic mushroom enclosure
Look at those little mushroom caps peeking out of the ground... and what is it? A troll? Don't be surprised if something truly wondrous happens in this magical enclosure.
Sugar Land
Yum, yum, yum. Lots of sweet tooths are flocking to Sugar Land. Everything there is simply delicious. Who else is enjoying the fence?
Ice mass
Water is a liquid with very unusual properties. The ice that floats on the surface of the water acts as a blanket against freezing. This allows marine animals to live even in the coldest seas.
Swimming pool
Roughly 71% of the Earth's surface is covered in water, and roughly 96.5% of all water is in the oceans. That's a lot!
Swimming pool
Roughly 71% of the Earth's surface is covered in water, and roughly 96.5% of all water is in the oceans. That's a lot!
Swimming pool
Roughly 71% of the Earth's surface is covered in water, and roughly 96.5% of all water is in the oceans. That's a lot!
Ice mass
Water is a liquid with very unusual properties. The ice that floats on the surface of the water acts as a blanket against freezing. This allows marine animals to live even in the coldest seas.
Ice mass
Water is a liquid with very unusual properties. The ice that floats on the surface of the water acts as a blanket against freezing. This allows marine animals to live even in the coldest seas.
Pirate's Cove
The golden age of piracy is long gone, but the spirit of bravado remains. Raise the pirate flag and take to the seas!
Pirate's Cove
The golden age of piracy is long gone, but the spirit of bravado remains. Raise the pirate flag and take to the seas!
Pirate's Cove
The golden age of piracy is long gone, but the spirit of bravado remains. Raise the pirate flag and take to the seas!
Expedition
What's hiding at the bottom of the sea? Grab your diving gear and go take a look!
Coral reef
Although they occupy only 0.1% of the ocean surface, coral reefs are home to over 25% of all marine life.
Coral reef
Although they occupy only 0.1% of the ocean surface, coral reefs are home to over 25% of all marine life.
Coral reef
Although they occupy only 0.1% of the ocean surface, coral reefs are home to over 25% of all marine life.
Caribbean
The Caribbean is an area encompassing the Caribbean Sea and over 700 islands, islets and cays. The sun always shines in this tropical paradise.
Caribbean
The Caribbean is an area encompassing the Caribbean Sea and over 700 islands, islets and cays. The sun always shines in this tropical paradise.
Caribbean
The Caribbean is an area encompassing the Caribbean Sea and over 700 islands, islets and cays. The sun always shines in this tropical paradise.
